Sum of factors 

Demographic + Disease = Raw risk scores 
 CMS adds the relative factors for all the demographic 
variables, HCCs, and interactions together. The result is 
the raw risk score. 

* CMS only adds frailty adjustments to the risk scores for PACE participants and community-based beneficiaries enrolled in 
qualifying Fully Integrated Dual Eligible Special Needs Plans (FIDE SNPs). For FIDE SNPs to qualify for a frailty
